text: SUTURE PASSERSSlingShot EFFICIENT The Champion Slingshot has been optimized for use in the shoulder and allows the surgeon to both pass and retrieve suture using a single portal. Its ergonomic thumb-slide design helps to eliminate additional procedural steps and potentially reduce operating time. EFFICIENT Optimized for the Shoulder Ergonomically designed thumb-slide mechanism helps to simplify the suture passing and retrieval steps. The small Nitinol Arms allow for the ability to quickly retrieve the suture, while the razor sharp needle tip helps to minimize potential damage to the labral tissue. Versatility With a 45° Left, 45° Right, and 70° Up tip option, the Champion SlingShot is specifically designed to address various labral pathologies of the Shoulder. 5670 Greenwood Plaza Blvd. Ste. 200 Greenwood Village, CO 80111 t: 201 831 5000 www.stryker.com www.sportsmedicine.stryker.com A surgeon must always rely on his or her own professional clinical judgment when deciding whether to use a particular product when treating a particular patient.
